items.title: Upgrade vue-router to 5.0.4 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps vue-router from version 4.5.1 to 5.0.4, introducing several bug fixes and new features. Key improvements include better compatibility with Node 20, enhanced route handling, and improved logging for aliases. This upgrade aims to enhance the overall stability and performance of the routing system.

items.title: Handle 400 BadRequestError Properly in Platform Service 🚀
items.summary: This update ensures that when the upstream API returns a 400 error without a data field, the system now correctly throws a BadRequestError instead of an ApiError. The fix involves explicitly checking for a 400 status and returning the appropriate error message to the client. This change improves error handling and provides clearer feedback to users.

items.title: Enhance Suno Remaster with Chirp V5-5 Support in Platform Service 🎉
items.summary: This update adds support for the `chirp-v5-5` model in the Suno remaster action on the openaihk worker. Key changes include updating the remaster model whitelist and validation checks to include the new model. This aligns the functionality with the existing ttapi worker implementation, ensuring consistency across services.

items.title: Update ESLint Plugin Promise to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the eslint-plugin-promise from version 6.0.0 to 7.2.1, introducing several fixes and new features. Key improvements include the addition of new options for existing rules and enhancements to dependency management, ensuring better linting capabilities and performance.

items.title: Update chart.js to version 4.5.1 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps chart.js from version 4.3.0 to 4.5.1, incorporating several bug fixes and enhancements. Key improvements include better handling of Doughnut chart legend options and fixes for chart resizing issues in Chrome. This upgrade ensures a more stable and feature-rich charting experience for users.

items.title: Update postcss to latest version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps postcss from version 8.5.6 to 8.5.8, addressing a fix for the Processor#version. Additionally, it improves source map annotation cleaning performance, enhancing overall efficiency. These changes ensure better compatibility and performance for our frontend assets.

items.title: Updated Vue Plugin to Latest Version in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the @vitejs/plugin-vue dependency from version 6.0.1 to 6.0.5. Key changes include the removal of Vite 8 beta support and various dependency updates, enhancing compatibility and stability. This ensures a smoother development experience and improved performance for the project.

items.title: Upgrade eslint-plugin-import to 2.32.0 in Frontend Web 🚀
items.summary: This update bumps the eslint-plugin-import package from version 2.25.4 to 2.32.0, introducing several new features and fixes. Key additions include the new enforce-node-protocol-usage rule and TypeScript types, along with improvements to existing rules like order and extensions. This upgrade enhances linting capabilities and overall code quality in the project.
